nextStep.title: Idea intake
nextStep.gate: Capture the raw idea, target outcome, operator constraints, and forbidden areas.

steps.title: Idea intake
steps.gate: Capture the raw idea, target outcome, operator constraints, and forbidden areas.

steps.title: Project contract
steps.gate: Define objective, audience, non-goals, evidence, rollback, and approval lines.

steps.title: Source inventory
steps.gate: Map files, folders, prior docs, receipts, screenshots, and current system state.

steps.title: Memory recall
steps.gate: Load relevant lessons, mistakes, evolution reports, LakeStrike/Factory history, and current project position.

steps.title: AECommander extract
steps.gate: Port only proven ideas: wave queue, handoff, FocusPane, cost gates, validator, snapshot receipts.

steps.title: Scope map
steps.gate: Turn the goal into features, acceptance criteria, and what must be visible to the operator.

steps.title: Risk map
steps.gate: Flag secrets, destructive actions, network exposure, deploys, database writes, and vendor/plugin installs.

steps.title: Architecture route
steps.gate: Choose the smallest durable architecture and name the write boundaries.

steps.title: Mission graph
steps.gate: Convert the scope into ordered nodes with owners, status, blockers, and receipts.

steps.title: UX and visual system
steps.gate: Define the command surface, interaction model, motion direction, responsive checks, and no-dead-control rule.

steps.title: Positioning and copy
steps.gate: Make the value proposition, product language, onboarding, and launch copy specific.

steps.title: Offer and value model
steps.gate: Clarify buyer value, pricing logic, proof of value, onboarding promise, and support boundary.

steps.title: Claims and legal review
steps.gate: Check naming, claims, license posture, privacy, data handling, and customer-facing language.

steps.title: Data and memory contract
steps.gate: Define what is stored, summarized, forgotten, linked, exported, and used for handoff.

steps.title: Codexa capacity gate
steps.gate: Prove Codexa rail, RAM, Docker, browser workers, local models, and network path before heavy work.

steps.title: Work sharding
steps.gate: Split only independent work. Keep cockpit interactive. Cap frontier lanes and heavy jobs.

steps.title: Implementation slice
steps.gate: Build the smallest complete useful slice, not a decorative dashboard.

steps.title: Local checks
steps.gate: Run syntax, build, tests, and endpoint smoke checks locally.

steps.title: Codexa checks
steps.gate: Run heavier checks on Codexa, summarize logs, and save raw receipts out of context.

steps.title: Visual proof loop
steps.gate: Capture desktop and compact screenshots; check overflow, blank panels, dead controls, and visual coherence.

steps.title: Checkmate verification
steps.gate: Run UI, runtime, API, data, security, and CI quality gates with honest statuses.

steps.title: Hallucination gate
steps.gate: Separate verified facts from assumptions. Block RED claims and require evidence for completion.

steps.title: Security scan
steps.gate: Scan raw secret patterns, permissions, supply chain, and state-changing paths.

steps.title: Review panel
steps.gate: Apply Goose/Iceman/Phoenix/Slider/Viper judgment before ship.

steps.title: Release plan
steps.gate: Name install/run path, smoke checks, rollback path, and operator handoff.

steps.title: Deploy or install smoke
steps.gate: Only after approval, prove install/deploy with receipts and rollback.

steps.title: Receipt
steps.gate: Record touched files, commands, tests, proof, risks, rollback, and next action.

steps.title: Memory compile
steps.gate: Keep the lesson, decay noise, update wiki/spine, and surface what not to repeat.

steps.title: Next scope with new eyes
steps.gate: Re-scope after evidence arrives. Iteration produces the innovation.
